prose.en: Transfer system backup information to the alternate storage site {param:cp-9.5_prm_1}.

parameters.name: cp-9.5_prm_1
parameters.label: organization-defined time period and transfer rate consistent with the recovery time and recovery point objectives

guidance.en: System backup information can be transferred to alternate storage sites either electronically or by the physical shipment of storage media.

prose.en: system backup information is transferred to the alternate storage site for {param:cp-09.05_odp.01};
system backup information is transferred to the alternate storage site {param:cp-09.05_odp.02}.

guidelines.en: time period consistent with recovery time and recovery point objectives is defined;
transfer rate consistent with recovery time and recovery point objectives is defined;
